fields.name: Bank Account No.
fields.tooltip:
Shows the number of the bank account that has been reconciled with the transaction on the bank statement on this line.
The program fills in the field from the Bank Account No. field on the Bank Account Reconciliation line.

fields.name: Statement No.
fields.tooltip:
Shows the number of the bank statement received from the bank that has been reconciled with the bank account on this line.
The program fills in the field from the Statement No. field on the Bank Account Reconciliation line.

fields.name: Statement Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Shows the number of this line.
The program fills in the field from the Statement Line No. field on the Bank Account Reconciliation line.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of this line.

fields.name: Transaction Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date of the bank account or check ledger entry that the transaction on this line has been applied to.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description for the transaction on this line.

fields.name: Statement Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the transaction on the bank's statement on this line.

fields.name: Difference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the difference between the amount in the Statement Amount field and Applied Amount field on this line.

fields.name: Applied Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount on the bank account or check ledger entry that the transaction on this line has been applied to.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of ledger entry, or a difference that has been reconciled with the transaction on the bank's statement on this line.

fields.name: Applied Entries
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the transaction on this line has been applied to one or more ledger entries.

fields.name: Value Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value date of the transaction on this line.

fields.name: Check No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the check number for the transaction on this line.
